warnings.long_duration: Estimated duration exceeds {{max_days}} days. Consider increasing traffic or relaxing MDE.
warnings.low_traffic: Effective test traffic is low. Duration and variance risk may be high.
warnings.missing_variance: Continuous metric requires std_dev for deterministic sample size calculation.
warnings.many_variants_low_traffic: Too many variants for the available traffic. Consider reducing the number of variants.
warnings.seasonality_present: Seasonality is present. Cover at least one full weekly cycle.
warnings.campaign_contamination: Active campaigns may contaminate the test and bias uplift estimates.
warnings.underpowered_design: Requested power is below the usual 0.8 threshold. Risk of false negatives is higher.
warnings.conservative_multivariant_alpha: More than two variants trigger a Bonferroni alpha correction. This is conservative and may overstate the required sample size.
warnings.long_test_not_possible: Expected duration is long, but the project cannot support a long-running test.
warnings.interim_looks_increase_sample: Sequential design with {{n_looks}} looks increases required sample size by ~{{pct}}%
warnings.srm_detected: Sample ratio mismatch detected (p < 0.001). Check randomization and tracking.

report.executive_summary: {{project_name}} tests whether {{change_description}} can improve {{primary_metric_name}} for {{target_audience}}. The deterministic plan estimates {{estimated_duration_days}} days with {{sample_size_per_variant}} users per variant.

guardrails.binary_note: With N={{sample_size_per_variant}} per variant, can detect >= {{detectable_mde}} pp change at 80% power
guardrails.continuous_note: With N={{sample_size_per_variant}} per variant, can detect >= {{detectable_mde}} change at 80% power

risks.no_major_warnings: No major deterministic warnings identified at this stage.
risks.product: Expected result depends on the hypothesis that {{desired_result}}.

recommendations.before_launch_default: Validate tracking and assignment before exposing live traffic.
recommendations.during_test_monitor: Monitor guardrail metrics and sample accumulation daily.
recommendations.during_test_avoid_early_stop: Avoid stopping the test early on short-term volatility.
recommendations.after_test_interpret: Interpret lift together with guardrail and diagnostic metrics.
recommendations.after_test_segment: Document segmentation effects before rollout decisions.

open_questions.validate: How will the team validate {{what_to_validate}} before launch?
open_questions.market_stability: Is the market context '{{market}}' stable during the planned test window?

html.title: Experiment Report
html.meta: Print-ready summary for stakeholders and handoff reviews.
html.name: Name

standalone.title: AB Test Report: {{project_name}}
standalone.no_warning_rules: No warning rules fired for the current configuration.
standalone.generated_by: Generated by AB Test Research Designer.

pdf.sample_size_subtitle: Required sample, traffic, and guardrail detectability
pdf.power_curve_subtitle: Power curve plus a compact sensitivity table
pdf.warnings_recommendations_subtitle: Warnings, analyst guidance, and recent revision history

schemas.continuous_guardrail_requires_mean_and_s: continuous guardrail requires baseline_mean and std_dev
schemas.binary_baseline_range: baseline_value must be between 0 and 1 for binary metrics
schemas.continuous_baseline_positive: baseline_value must be positive for continuous metrics
schemas.continuous_std_positive: std_dev must be positive for continuous metrics
schemas.binary_rejects_continuous_data: binary metric_type does not accept continuous data
schemas.continuous_rejects_binary_data: continuous metric_type does not accept binary data
schemas.actual_counts_positive_sum: actual_counts must sum to a positive total
schemas.baseline_rate_range: baseline_rate must be between 0 and 100 for binary metrics
schemas.baseline_mean_positive: baseline_mean must be positive for continuous metrics
schemas.power_values_range: power_values must contain values between 0 and 1
schemas.observed_expected_same_length: observed_counts and expected_fractions must have same length

errors.srm_detected: SRM detected - check your randomization or tracking implementation
